ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( Re_Evaluate_Territory__c ) && Re_Evaluate_Territory__c && ( RecordType.Name <> 'Default' || ( CONTAINS(Owner_Division__c, 'Reseller') || Owner_Division__c = 'Channel Sales' || Owner_Division__c = 'Marketing' || Owner_Division__c = 'OEM - CSM' || Owner_Division__c = 'OEM - Sales' || Owner_Division__c = 'OEM - SDR' || Owner_Division__c = 'Self Serve - Growth' ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The flag Re_Evaluate_Territory cannot be updated when the Account Record Type is not set to Default or when the Account Owner Role is not included in the Territory Management.
